Title: Successful login with valid credentials
Expected Result: User is redirected to the dashboard and can view profile and order history
Steps: Navigate to the login page; Enter a registered email address; Enter the correct password; Click the login button

Title: Login fails with incorrect password
Expected Result: Error message Invalid email or password" is displayed and user remains on the login page"
Steps: Navigate to the login page; Enter a registered email address; Enter an incorrect password; Click the login button

Title: Login fails with unregistered email
Expected Result: Error message Invalid email or password" is displayed and user remains on the login page"
Steps: Navigate to the login page; Enter an email address that is not registered; Enter any password; Click the login button

Title: Login validation when email field is empty
Expected Result: Validation message Email is required" is displayed next to the email field"
Steps: Navigate to the login page; Leave the email field blank; Enter a valid password; Click the login button

Title: Login validation when password field is empty
Expected Result: Validation message Password is required" is displayed next to the password field"
Steps: Navigate to the login page; Enter a valid email address; Leave the password field blank; Click the login button

Title: Login with email containing leading/trailing spaces
Expected Result: System trims spaces, login succeeds, and user is redirected to the dashboard
Steps: Navigate to the login page; Enter a registered email address with leading and trailing spaces; Enter the correct password; Click the login button

Title: Login with password at maximum allowed length (128 characters)
Expected Result: Login succeeds and user is redirected to the dashboard
Steps: Navigate to the login page; Enter a registered email address; Enter a password exactly 128 characters long; Click the login button

Title: Login with password exceeding maximum length (129 characters)
Expected Result: Error message Password exceeds maximum length" is displayed and login is blocked"
Steps: Navigate to the login page; Enter a registered email address; Enter a password 129 characters long; Click the login button

Title: Authorization check: accessing profile without authentication
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login page with a message indicating authentication is required
Steps: Open a new browser session; Directly navigate to the profile page URL without logging in

Title: Non‑functional: login response time under 2 seconds
Expected Result: Login process completes and dashboard loads within 2 seconds
Steps: Navigate to the login page; Enter a registered email address; Enter the correct password; Start timer; Click the login button; Stop timer when dashboard loads
